title: PSG Origins SMP
body:
Are you crying because you can't get mods to work? Are you in a perpetual state of not being able to use minecraft because you're too silly to figure out how mods work? Don't worry, this passive agressive modpack is here for you. Just click the update button that took me ages to set up so you don't have to even try to think. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e6c6f54e7ccd387960f01af621113dc4535430f.png)
Just click the update button (you may have to restart the modrinth app for it to appear) every time before you play/launch the game.
